original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Henry, Emily, Luke, and Chloe. Henry stated, "Emily is a knight if and only if Luke is a knight". "Chloe is a knight," Emily declared. "Emily is a knave or Luke is a knight" - Luke. "Henry is a knave" - Chloe. So who is a knight and who is a knave?

similar_questions.question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Alex, Sarah, Tom, and Mia.
